sub_providers.description: Fast and cheap. Use for simple search, file ops, and lightweight tasks.
Strong general-purpose model. Use for code generation and multi-step reasoning.
Cost-effective coding model. Good for code generation and technical tasks.
Deep reasoning model (chain-of-thought). Use for math, logic, and complex analysis.
Alibaba Qwen. Strong multilingual and Chinese-language tasks.
Fast Qwen model. Use for quick tasks and large document processing.
Llama 3.3 70B via NVIDIA NIM. Strong open-source model for general tasks.
DeepSeek R1 via NVIDIA NIM. State-of-the-art reasoning for math and coding.
Qwen3 Coder 480B via NVIDIA NIM. Top-tier agentic coding model, 256k context.
Mistral Small 3.1 via NVIDIA NIM. Fast multimodal model, 128k context.
Kimi K2.5 by Moonshot. Strong reasoning model with long context, good for complex analysis and agentic tasks.
MiniMax M1 reasoning model. Strong at math, coding, and multi-step reasoning with extended thinking.
GLM-5 by Zhipu. 744B MoE reasoning model, strong at agentic tasks and long-horizon planning.
Qwen QwQ-Plus reasoning model. Deep thinking for math, logic, and complex problem-solving.
Qwen3 8B running locally via Ollama. Free, private, no API key needed. Good for simple tasks, drafting, and quick iteration.
Qwen3 14B running locally via Ollama. Free, private, stronger reasoning than 8B. Use for code review, moderate complexity tasks.
